friendly_name: Design System Monorepo Infrastructure & CI Scaffold
purpose_context: The Spec Kitty design system will be consumed by multiple frontend targets — Angular, plain JavaScript, and static HTML for Jekyll/Hugo sites. This mission wires up the repository structure (nx monorepo with separate publishable packages), configures Storybook to serve all three targets, establishes the documentation scaffold, and installs a CI quality pipeline enforcing linting, accessibility, visual regression, Playwright cross-browser tests, and Lighthouse audits. No visual components are built in this mission — only the infrastructure that makes every future component correct by default.
purpose_tldr: Establish the monorepo structure, multi-framework Storybook, distribution packages, and CI quality pipeline for the Spec Kitty design system before any component work begins.
